description: Recurring meetings for a premium long-haul airline domain that must coordinate guest retail, loyalty, holidays, corporate distribution, disruption-heavy operations, and cargo.

meetings.title: Daily Network Triage
meetings.description: A short operational review of current and near-term disruption risks across flights, stations, crew, and guest fallout.
meetings.goal: Keep operational and guest-recovery teams aligned on the highest-risk flights and decisions for the next 24-48 hours.

meetings.title: Guest and Loyalty Triad Sync
meetings.description: A weekly decision session across guest commerce and loyalty teams focused on premium conversion, loyalty economics, and trip confidence.
meetings.goal: Keep direct retail, loyalty, and servicing choices aligned around guest and revenue outcomes.

meetings.title: Holidays Readiness Review
meetings.description: A weekly review of package conversion, staged payments, traveller readiness, and pre-travel support backlog.
meetings.goal: Reduce leisure booking fallout and keep holiday servicing issues from eroding conversion or margin.

meetings.title: Disruption Learning Review
meetings.description: A weekly review of disrupted journeys, guest fallout, compensation drivers, and where product or process changes can reduce repeat failures.
meetings.goal: Turn operational incidents into product and process learning rather than repeating the same disruption patterns.

meetings.title: Corporate Channel Council
meetings.description: A biweekly review of corporate account health, distribution leakage, partner continuity problems, and NDC adoption barriers.
meetings.goal: Keep commercial, product, and partner teams aligned on where stronger content control and continuity matter most.

meetings.title: Cargo Exception Review
meetings.description: A biweekly review of cargo visibility gaps, premium-product failures, and support or handling exceptions.
meetings.goal: Keep digital cargo adoption grounded in operational truth and premium-product reliability.

meetings.title: Domain Roadmap Review
meetings.description: A monthly cross-domain review of KPI movement, discovery findings, and sequencing tradeoffs across guest, holiday, commercial, operations, cargo, and platform teams.
meetings.goal: Keep the domain roadmap current, evidence-based, and synchronized with actual capacity and operational risk.
